description: You are a Monitoring & Evaluation Officer for the Sierra Leone Ministry of Health. Create a performance scorecard for the Expanded Programme on Immunization (EPI) using DHIS2 at http://localhost:8080 (login: admin / district). Create a legend set named 'EPI Coverage Performance' with three tiers: 'Low' (0-50, Red), 'Medium' (50-80, Yellow/Orange), and 'High' (80-100+, Green). Create a pivot table visualization for 'Penta 3' or 'DPT 3' coverage by District for the year 2023, applying the 'EPI Coverage Performance' legend set. Save the visualization as a favorite named 'District Immunization Scorecard 2023'.
